scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:ts && pnpm run lint:rust
scripts.lint:ts: pnpm -C photo-verifier exec eslint . && pnpm -C demo-site run lint && pnpm -C packages/core run lint && pnpm -C packages/core-mobile run lint && pnpm -C packages/blockchain run lint && pnpm -C packages/photoverifier-sdk run lint && pnpm -C packages/photoverifier-seeker-sdk run lint
scripts.test:blockchain-parity: pnpm -C packages/blockchain run build && pnpm -C packages/core-mobile run build && pnpm -C packages/photoverifier-sdk run build && node --test scripts/blockchain-parity.test.mjs scripts/binary-codec-vectors.test.mjs scripts/presign-onchain-flow.test.mjs scripts/seeker-verification-flow.test.mjs scripts/seeker-cache.test.mjs scripts/tree-cost-edge-cases.test.mjs scripts/h3-pda-contracts.test.mjs
scripts.test:core-sdk-parity: pnpm -C packages/core run build && pnpm -C packages/core-mobile run build && pnpm -C packages/photoverifier-sdk run build && pnpm -C packages/photoverifier-seeker-sdk run build && node --test scripts/core-sdk-parity.test.mjs scripts/seeker-sdk-facade.test.mjs scripts/cluster-routing.test.mjs
scripts.test:demo-api-runtime: pnpm -C demo-site exec tsc -p tsconfig.api-runtime.json && node --test demo-site/.test-dist/app/api/_shared/api-error.test.js scripts/demo-api-runtime.test.mjs scripts/demo-runtime-cache.test.mjs
scripts.check:contracts: pnpm -C packages/core run build && node scripts/check-contract-constants.mjs
scripts.check:no-dist-imports: if rg -n "@photoverifier/.*/dist/" packages/blockchain/src; then echo "Disallowed cross-package dist imports found in blockchain package"; exit 1; fi
